company: Evergy Kansas Central, Inc. and Evergy Kansas South, Inc.

source_note: Kansas Corporation Commission Order approving the unanimous Settlement Agreement in the Evergy Kansas Central, Inc. and Evergy Kansas South, Inc. base-rate case, Docket No. 25-EKCE-294-RTS (88 pp) — the utilities' application sought a net revenue-requirement increase of ~$196.4M (~$192M base, 8.64%). Listed for reference (metadata-only). Source: Kansas Corporation Commission eSTAR (estar.kcc.ks.gov/estar/ViewFile.aspx, document Id a0f02909-3351-4599-8d21-75c879fdd16c).
